scores.notes: The text accuracy is very low with numerous misspellings, character substitutions, and garbled words. The table structure is almost completely lost, with columns and rows not preserved, making the data unreadable. Numeric precision is poor due to the table structure issues and character errors. Layout preservation is also very poor, as the original document's structure is not maintained. While most of the text seems to be present, its garbled nature makes it difficult to confirm completeness.
